sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56476" key="keleu/qeios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κελεύθ-ειος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n56476.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">belonging to the road</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δαίμονες</foreign> Id.: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κελεύθειᾰ</foreign>, epith. of Athena at Sparta, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:12:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.12.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
